title: Bitcoin Price: The Oil Reserves Keeping Markets Alive Are About to Run Out — Why BTC Could Be in Trouble
description: The Bitcoin price has spent five weeks bouncing between $60,000 and $73,000. BTC rallies when Trump hints at ending the Iran war and crashes when he escalates. Traders keep reacting to his comments, but the real threat to Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is what happens when the emergency oil reserves keeping global markets together run out.  ... Bitcoin Price: The Oil Reserves Keeping Markets Alive Are About to Run Out — Why BTC Could Be in Trouble
